title: Europe’s Industrial Accelerator Act Must Mean Made in Europe [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe’s Industrial Accelerator Act can strengthen strategic value chains and low-carbon manufacturing only if it prioritises genuinely European production. Clear rules on Union origin, low-carbon aluminium and review mechanisms are essential to support investment, competitiveness and Europe’s industrial resilience.
